While the patient is on Metformin and Heparin, these do not explicitly confirm an ongoing or active diagnosis of a lipid disorder that would warrant a "Yes" prediction based on the strict criteria provided. Therefore, based on the absence of explicit lipid disorder evidence, the prediction is "No".
